message: hey dad, how's it going?
it's going ok... been mowing the lawn all morning...
wish you were using a self-propelled mower 😂
I know they're nice but I like the exercise...
don't you get too worn out though?
I get some exercise but it's not too bad...
my bac kwould appreciate a self-propelled mower 😂
I'll think about getting one next time I'm at the hardware store...
what's for dinner tonight?
I was thinking of amking some pasta with meatballs...
i was thinking of picking up some chinese on the way home
I think the Chinese food is a good idea...
i'm running a bit behind, traffic is a nightmare
Oh no I think I left the garage door open...
You should close it... save some energy and keep the house secure...
dude come on you just told me to close it
Sorry I did it again...
just make a habit of it, okay?
Will try to remember next time...
idk how many times i have to tell you lol
Guess I need a reminder app...
that's a good idea btw
I'll get the app tomorrow...
amke sure you get it tomorrow tho, i don't want to have to check on it again
Will try to get it done today...
seriously tho, can u just close the garage door now?
Just closed the garage door... Love, Dad
glad you closed it but next time just close it in the first place lol
My lawn needs mowing too... Love, Dad
u mowed the lawn now did u close the garage door again?
lol stop playing dumb and just check the garage door already
I checked the garage door it's still open...
I just went to check and it's still open...
dude just close the garage door already and btw dont 4get the parmesan for the pasta recipe
omg dont forget the parmesan is the good kind not the pre shredded stuff
I'll grab the good parmesan cheese... the block kind... Love, Dad
omg dad u dont have to say it like that its just parmesan cheese lol
I'llg et the block parmesan from the store then... see you soon!
btw u know i can just get it myself lol
dads still got it even if u r acting all annoyed 😂
hey can u pick up that truffle gouda i need it for tonights dinner
dude i already told you i'd do it over the weekend not today 🤦‍♂️
I know you said weekend but the grass is getting long... fill up the gas tank too before you start mowing.
yeah i know the grass is long but i still got stuff to do today i'll get to it eventually
fill up the gas tank first and dont forget to use premium gas it makes a difference
dude i'm not gonna use premium gas it's not that big of a deal 🙄
I'm serious about the premimu gas Alex it makes a big difference in your engine's performance Love, Dad
dude come on it's just lawn mower gas it's not gonna break the bank 🙃
I'm just saying it's worth the extra money for your car's engine...
dude i've already told yo ui'm not gonna use premium gas can we just agree to disagree on this one 🙃
i'm gonna go mow the lawn now stop worrying about the gas thanks
Don't forget to check the oil and blade before you start mowing... Love, Dad
i've already checked the oil and blade dad i'm good to go now
Be careful not to hit any rocks or branches with the mower... Love, Dad
dad i'm gonna be fine with the mower stop worrying about the rocks and branches i've got this 😂
don't forget to mow around the garden beds they need to be trimmed... Love, Dad
Don't forget to fill up the gas tank before you mow... Love, Dad
hey dad can i borrow the car for the weekend too? do i need to fill up the gas tank before returning it?
dude can i borrow the car for the weekend too? and yeah i'll fill up the gas tank before returning it
Be careful with the car too... oil and tire pressure check before you go... Love, Dad
dude stop worrying about the oil and tire pressure check i'll take care of it i'm not a total idiot 😂
don't be so quick to judge me boy i've had my fair share of car troubles in my time...
dude can we just focus on the car for the weekend and not the past dad?
I still want to see the oil and tire pressure checked before you take off... Love, Dad
ok fine i'll check the oil and tire pressure before i leave but can i please just have the car now?
ok bring it over to the house and fill up the gas tank while you're at it...
can i just bring the car back to you full when i return it or do i need to fill it up before i leave?
just fill it up when you return it boy that's the way it's always been done...
ok so just fill it up when i return it then?
I thought we were clear on that now bring it over and i'll help you check the oil and tire pressure before you leave Love, Dad
ok dad i think we are clear on that but can i just have the keys now?
